name: Exercise Ball Sit-Up
shortDescription: A core exercise where sit-ups are performed while stabilizing on a Swiss ball, increasing abdominal activation.
instructions: Sit on a stability ball and walk your feet forward until the ball is under your lower back. Cross your arms over your chest or place hands behind your head, then contract your abs to lift your torso, performing a sit-up. Lower yourself back down slowly and repeat.
steps: Sit on the exercise ball with feet flat on the floor.
Walk feet forward, rolling until the ball supports your lower back.
Cross arms over your chest or position hands behind your head.
Engage your core and sit up, lifting your upper body.
Lower back down under control to starting position.
commonMistakes: Ball not positioned under lower back
breathing: Exhale as you lift, inhale as you lower.
